name: Banana Sour Cream Waffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together dry ingredients. Set aside.
2. Mix together beaten egg yolk, sour cream, milk, butter and banana in a bowl.
3. Add the flour mixture to the wet ingredients, mixing well until combined.
4. Fold in whipped egg white.
5. Pour the batter into an oiled waffle iron or oiled pan.
6. Cook each side until brown.
